content.full_text:
Fern Polfrrcer PRACTTcEs CouvrrssroN
428 J Street o Suite 620 o Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 o Fax (916) 322-0886
December 2,2009
Donald Letcher
788 No. Rengstorff Avenue
Mountain View, CA93426
Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-09-262
Dear Mr. Letcher:
This letter is in response to your request for written advice of November 24,2009. Your
inquiry primarily presents issues which are outside the purview of the Political Reform Act
("Act")'. Under the provisions of Regulation 18329(bX8)(D), copy enclosed, any request not
meeting the requirements for formal written advice must be declined by this agency. You may
want to contact the Attorney General's office or your local district attorney's office.
If you have any questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.
Sincerely,
Scott Hallabrin
Counsel
By:
ohn W. Wallace
General Counsel
Division
JWW:jgl
Enclosure
' The Political Reform Act is contained in Government Code Sections 81000 through 91014. All statutory
references are to the Government Code, unless otherwise indicated. The regulations of the Fair Political Practices
Commission are contained in Sections l8l l0 through 18997 of Title 2 of the California Code of Regulations. All
regulatory references are to Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations, unless otherwise indicated.
Re:

sections.conclusion: Your inquiry primarily presents issues which are outside the purview of the Political Reform Act. Under the provisions of Regulation 18329(b)(8)(D), any request not meeting the requirements for formal written advice must be declined by this agency. You may want to contact the Attorney General's office or your local district attorney's office.
sections.question_synthetic: The requester asked for written advice on matters that fall outside the scope of the Political Reform Act.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC declines to provide formal written advice because the issues raised fall outside the Political Reform Act's scope and do not meet the requirements for formal written advice.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Declination letter with no formal QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections. Document lacks detailed question content but clearly states basis for declining the request under Regulation 18329(b)(8)(D).

QUESTION: The requester asked for written advice on matters that fall outside the scope of the Political Reform Act.

CONCLUSION: Your inquiry primarily presents issues which are outside the purview of the Political Reform Act. Under the provisions of Regulation 18329(b)(8)(D), any request not meeting the requirements for formal written advice must be declined by this agency. You may want to contact the Attorney General's office or your local district attorney's office.

embedding.summary: The FPPC declines Donald Letcher's November 24, 2009 request for written advice, finding that the inquiry presents issues outside the purview of the Political Reform Act and recommending he contact the Attorney General's or local district attorney's office.
